headline: 1 Nasdaq 100 Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Brush Off
summary: While the Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is filled with cutting-edge technology and consumer companies, not all are on solid footing. Some are dealing with declining demand, high costs, or regulatory pressures that could limit future upside.

headline: Jim Cramer Says He Thinks “DoorDash Is a Buy”
summary: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money, highlighting several companies with market caps over a trillion dollars. Inquiring about the stock, a caller mentioned that they are down 30%. Cramer replied: Okay, I think DoorDash is a buy. There’s a real group of stocks now, Uber, DoorDash, Reddit, they […]

headline: DoorDash Extends Reach With Middle East Talks And Dollar Tree Deal
summary: DoorDash is reported to have approached Delivery Hero investors about acquiring parts of its business, with a focus on Middle East platforms Talabat and HungerStation. The company has also announced a major retail partnership with Dollar Tree, extending on demand delivery to more than 9,000 Dollar Tree stores across the US. These developments arrive as investors track how DoorDash expands internationally and grows beyond restaurant delivery into broader local retail. For investors watching...

headline: Uber Technologies (UBER) Explores Delivery Hero Takeover
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the 12 Strong Buy Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 22, 2026, Uber Technologies, Inc.
